title: Expense tracking - Concur Alternative
excerpt: I created a board that integrates with Outlook. It pushes every appointment to the board, has categories for parking, mileage, lodging etc, captures receipts using your phone camera and exports to a report for reimbursem…

posts.author: BobChristmas (Bob.christmas@bblumberg.org)
posts.cookedHtml: I created a board that integrates with Outlook. It pushes every appointment to the board, has categories for parking, mileage, lodging etc, captures receipts using your phone camera and exports to a report for reimbursement. Anyone interested let me know.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: He’s offering to share a solution with others, not seeking a consultant.

posts.author: BobChristmas (Bob.christmas@bblumberg.org)
posts.cookedHtml: BTW I am not a consultant or am I charging for this. I am just a fan of Monday.com and I know what expense tracking software costs. Be happy to share.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: And I have dealt with concur. Why Is expense tracking software (enterprise level esp.) so obtuse?

posts.author: aolavarria (Adriana Olavarria)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BobChristmas, would love to see it. I’m working on a Concur alternative as well.

posts.author: BobChristmas (Bob.christmas@bblumberg.org)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure. send me an email and I’ll set up a call to show you what I did. Would love to share ideas. bob.christmas@bblumberg.org
